item.title: Avoid sounding robotic when negotiating salary. 🤖💼 Use: "I reviewed industry standards and believe X is fair." #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Avoid sounding robotic when negotiating salary. 🤖💼 Use: "I reviewed industry standards and believe X is fair." #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
